iti106:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti106:2.1: “Monks, living with Brahma are those families where, in the home, mother & father are revered by the children.
iti106:2.2: Living with the first devas are those families where, in the home, mother & father are revered by the children.
iti106:2.3: Living with the first teachers are those families where, in the home, mother & father are revered by the children.
iti106:2.4: Living with those worthy of gifts are those families where, in the home, mother & father are revered by the children.
iti106:3.1: ‘Brahma’ is a synonym for mother & father.
iti106:3.2: ‘The first devas’ is a synonym for mother & father.
iti106:3.3: ‘The first teachers’ is a synonym for mother & father.
iti106:3.4: ‘Those worthy of gifts’ is a synonym for mother & father.
iti106:3.6:
Mother & father do much for their children.
They care for them, nourish them, introduce them to this world.”
iti106:4.1: Mother & father, compassionate to their family, are called Brahma,
iti106:4.3: those worthy of gifts from their children.
iti106:5.1: So the wise should pay them homage,
iti106:6.1: Performing these services to their parents,
iti106:6.4: and after death rejoice in heaven.
